task.title: BoundWidget.id_for_label ignores id set by ChoiceWidget.options

rating.rationale: The fix exactly matches the ground truth diff — replacing the hardcoded id format with self.data['attrs'].get('id'). The agent also updated an existing test that was asserting the buggy behavior and added a new test covering the custom auto_id case. Verification ran the full forms_tests, auth_tests.test_forms, and related suites with zero failures, and the HANDOFF is clear and concise.
